lean_tests:
#eval is_power_of_two 1  -- true
#eval is_power_of_two 16  -- true
#eval is_power_of_two 0  -- false
#eval is_power_of_two 6  -- false

theorems.name: is_power_of_two_one
theorems.statement: theorem is_power_of_two_one : is_power_of_two 1 = true

theorems.name: is_power_of_two_zero
theorems.statement: theorem is_power_of_two_zero : is_power_of_two 0 = false

theorems.name: is_power_of_two_iff
theorems.statement: theorem is_power_of_two_iff (n : Nat) : is_power_of_two n = true ↔ ∃ k, n = 2 ^ k

theorems.name: count_set_bits_zero
theorems.statement: theorem count_set_bits_zero : count_set_bits 0 = 0

theorems.name: count_set_bits_le_log
theorems.statement: theorem count_set_bits_le (n : Nat) : count_set_bits n ≤ n

theorems.name: count_set_bits_power_of_two
theorems.statement: theorem count_set_bits_power_of_two (k : Nat) : count_set_bits (2 ^ k) = 1

lean_translation:
def parity (n : Nat) : Nat :=
  if h : n = 0 then 0
  else (n % 2 + parity (n / 2)) % 2
termination_by n
decreasing_by exact Nat.div_lt_self (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero h) (by omega)

theorems.name: parity_zero
theorems.statement: theorem parity_zero : parity 0 = 0

theorems.name: parity_mod2_count
theorems.statement: theorem parity_mod2_count (n : Nat) : parity n = count_set_bits n % 2

theorems.name: parity_range
theorems.statement: theorem parity_range (n : Nat) : parity n = 0 ∨ parity n = 1

theorems.name: next_power_of_two_ge
theorems.statement: theorem next_power_of_two_ge (n : Nat) : next_power_of_two n ≥ n

theorems.name: next_power_of_two_is_pow2
theorems.statement: theorem next_power_of_two_is_pow2 (n : Nat) : is_power_of_two (next_power_of_two n) = true

theorems.name: next_power_of_two_zero
theorems.statement: theorem next_power_of_two_zero : next_power_of_two 0 = 1

theorems.name: lowest_set_bit_zero
theorems.statement: theorem lowest_set_bit_zero : lowest_set_bit 0 = 0

theorems.name: lowest_set_bit_dvd
theorems.statement: theorem lowest_set_bit_dvd (n : Nat) : n > 0 → lowest_set_bit n ∣ n

theorems.name: lowest_set_bit_is_pow2
theorems.statement: theorem lowest_set_bit_is_pow2 (n : Nat) : n > 0 → is_power_of_two (lowest_set_bit n) = true

lean_translation:
def clear_lowest_set_bit (n : Nat) : Nat :=
  n - lowest_set_bit n

theorems.name: clear_lowest_set_bit_zero
theorems.statement: theorem clear_lowest_set_bit_zero : clear_lowest_set_bit 0 = 0

theorems.name: clear_lowest_set_bit_le
theorems.statement: theorem clear_lowest_set_bit_le (n : Nat) : clear_lowest_set_bit n ≤ n

theorems.name: clear_lowest_set_bit_count
theorems.statement: theorem clear_lowest_set_bit_count (n : Nat) : n > 0 → count_set_bits (clear_lowest_set_bit n) = count_set_bits n - 1

source:
def is_power_of_two(n: int) -> bool:
    return n != 0 and (n & (n - 1)) == 0
tests:
def is_power_of_two(n):
    return n!=0 and (n&(n-1))==0
assert is_power_of_two(1)
assert is_power_of_two(16)
assert not is_power_of_two(0)
assert not is_power_of_two(6)
lean_tests:
#eval is_power_of_two 1  -- true
#eval is_power_of_two 16  -- true
#eval is_power_of_two 0  -- false
#eval is_power_of_two 6  -- false

theorems.name: is_power_of_two_one
theorems.statement: theorem is_power_of_two_one : is_power_of_two 1 = true

theorems.name: is_power_of_two_zero
theorems.statement: theorem is_power_of_two_zero : is_power_of_two 0 = false

theorems.name: is_power_of_two_iff
theorems.statement: theorem is_power_of_two_iff (n : Nat) : is_power_of_two n = true ↔ ∃ k, n = 2 ^ k

tests:
def count_set_bits(n):
    c=0
    while n: c+=n&1; n>>=1
    return c
assert count_set_bits(0)==0
assert count_set_bits(7)==3
assert count_set_bits(255)==8

theorems.name: count_set_bits_zero
theorems.statement: theorem count_set_bits_zero : count_set_bits 0 = 0

theorems.name: count_set_bits_le_log
theorems.statement: theorem count_set_bits_le (n : Nat) : count_set_bits n ≤ n

theorems.name: count_set_bits_power_of_two
theorems.statement: theorem count_set_bits_power_of_two (k : Nat) : count_set_bits (2 ^ k) = 1

lean_translation:
def parity (n : Nat) : Nat :=
  if h : n = 0 then 0
  else (n % 2 + parity (n / 2)) % 2
termination_by n
decreasing_by exact Nat.div_lt_self (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero h) (by omega)
tests:
def parity(n):
    p=0
    while n: p^=(n&1); n>>=1
    return p
assert parity(0)==0
assert parity(7)==1
assert parity(3)==0

theorems.name: parity_zero
theorems.statement: theorem parity_zero : parity 0 = 0

theorems.name: parity_mod2_count
theorems.statement: theorem parity_mod2_count (n : Nat) : parity n = count_set_bits n % 2

theorems.name: parity_range
theorems.statement: theorem parity_range (n : Nat) : parity n = 0 ∨ parity n = 1

source:
def next_power_of_two(n: int) -> int:
    if n == 0:
        return 1
    n -= 1
    n |= n >> 1
    n |= n >> 2
    n |= n >> 4
    n |= n >> 8
    n |= n >> 16
    return n + 1
tests:
def next_power_of_two(n):
    if n==0: return 1
    n-=1; n|=n>>1; n|=n>>2; n|=n>>4; n|=n>>8; n|=n>>16
    return n+1
assert next_power_of_two(0)==1
assert next_power_of_two(5)==8
assert next_power_of_two(8)==8

theorems.name: next_power_of_two_ge
theorems.statement: theorem next_power_of_two_ge (n : Nat) : next_power_of_two n ≥ n

theorems.name: next_power_of_two_is_pow2
theorems.statement: theorem next_power_of_two_is_pow2 (n : Nat) : is_power_of_two (next_power_of_two n) = true

theorems.name: next_power_of_two_zero
theorems.statement: theorem next_power_of_two_zero : next_power_of_two 0 = 1

source:
def lowest_set_bit(n: int) -> int:
    return n & (~n + 1)

theorems.name: lowest_set_bit_zero
theorems.statement: theorem lowest_set_bit_zero : lowest_set_bit 0 = 0

theorems.name: lowest_set_bit_dvd
theorems.statement: theorem lowest_set_bit_dvd (n : Nat) : n > 0 → lowest_set_bit n ∣ n

theorems.name: lowest_set_bit_is_pow2
theorems.statement: theorem lowest_set_bit_is_pow2 (n : Nat) : n > 0 → is_power_of_two (lowest_set_bit n) = true

source:
def clear_lowest_set_bit(n: int) -> int:
    return n & (n - 1)
lean_translation:
def clear_lowest_set_bit (n : Nat) : Nat :=
  n - lowest_set_bit n

theorems.name: clear_lowest_set_bit_zero
theorems.statement: theorem clear_lowest_set_bit_zero : clear_lowest_set_bit 0 = 0

theorems.name: clear_lowest_set_bit_le
theorems.statement: theorem clear_lowest_set_bit_le (n : Nat) : clear_lowest_set_bit n ≤ n

theorems.name: clear_lowest_set_bit_count
theorems.statement: theorem clear_lowest_set_bit_count (n : Nat) : n > 0 → count_set_bits (clear_lowest_set_bit n) = count_set_bits n - 1
